name: Chocolate Caramel Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine walnuts and chocolate crumbs; set aside.
4. Place crispy rice cereal, brown sugar, and margarine into the food processor bowl.
5. Using the metal blade, process until the mixture is fine crumbs.
6. Press the mixture into the bottom and 1-inch up the sides of the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 8 minutes.
8. Spread caramel topping evenly over the bottom of the crust. Set aside 2 tablespoons of the chocolate-walnut mixture and sprinkle the remainder over the topping; set aside.
9. In another mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, granulated sugar, salt, egg whites, lemon peel, vanilla extract, and sour cream.
10. Spread this mixture over the prepared crust.
11. Bake for 45 minutes or until the center is set and the cheesecake starts to crack around the edges.
12. Remove from oven and cool for 1 hour.
